name: ptoclaw
description: Plan PTO from a local SQLite database with a safe CLI and calendar sync previews.

interface.longDescription: PTOClaw is a small OpenClaw plugin and CLI for storing PTO settings and plans in local SQLite, forecasting balances, and previewing calendar sync events with stable external IDs.
defaultPrompt: Add a planned vacation to PTOClaw.
Preview calendar events for my PTO plan.
